scripts.test: tsx --test src/services/applicationLocationOptions.test.ts src/services/contactTagColumnWrite.test.ts src/services/mondayFileColumns.test.ts src/services/buildCoupleApplication.test.ts src/services/mondayTimelineColumn.test.ts src/services/itinerary.test.ts src/services/itineraryFromFiles.test.ts src/utils/condenseItineraryPdfFiles.test.ts src/utils/volunteerFileDedup.test.ts src/utils/volunteerFileSlots.test.ts src/utils/formatContactAddress.test.ts src/utils/filterApplications.test.ts src/utils/termProgress.test.ts src/utils/formatDateOfBirth.test.ts src/utils/formatMondayNoteBody.test.ts src/utils/formatItinerary.test.ts src/services/parseSuperMailUpdate.test.ts src/utils/supermailTemplateMining.test.ts src/services/matchEndOfServiceReviews.test.ts
scripts.monday:dev: npm run dev & npm run monday:tunnel
scripts.monday:deploy: npm run build && echo 'Deploy using monday.com Developer Center or API'
scripts.firebase:deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
